compiled_state.title: RED: Write test for flaky scoring dimension in rubric
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-flaky-scoring.sh with two subtests:
- test_flaky_dimension_in_rubric: grep SKILL.md scoring rubric for 'intermittent.*flaky' pattern
- test_additive_contribution_note: grep SKILL.md near rubric for 'additive'

Both must FAIL (RED) against current SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-flaky-scoring.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-flaky-scoring.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-flaky-scoring.sh
- [ ] Tests fail RED against current SKILL.md (no intermittent row yet)
  Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-flaky-scoring.sh

comments.body: Fixed: RED test file created, verified executable, syntax clean, all tests fail RED as expected
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
